eta_definition.pass: one chat execution block that advances 10 atomic training steps and then evaluates and preserves the checkpoint
eta_definition.to_step100: 6 more 10-step passes; potentially 3 passes if 20-step blocks remain stable
eta_definition.to_heldout_bpb_below_4: approximately 5-10 more 10-step passes, conditional on continued improvement
eta_definition.to_readable_generation: approximately 10-25 more 10-step passes, but generation quality rather than step count is the gate
eta_definition.to_1_8_bpb: not credibly predictable yet; likely tens to more than 100 additional 10-step passes and may require optimizer, data, or architecture changes

honesty_note: Step counts are not a guarantee of competence. Held-out BPB, readable fixed-seed generation, and frozen instruction evaluations control regrading.
